meta.heroDescription: Join a team that lives and breathes the outdoors. At Harness Adventure Resort, every day brings new challenges, breathtaking views, and the chance to make someone's experience unforgettable.
meta.sectionDescription: We're looking for passionate, energetic people who love the outdoors and thrive in dynamic environments. Whether you're guiding ziplines, hosting events, or managing operations — there's a place for you here.

perks.title: Free Activity Access
perks.description: All staff enjoy complimentary access to every activity on-site — zipline, rafting, swing, and more.

perks.title: Growth & Training
perks.description: We invest in your development with paid safety certifications, guide training, and leadership programs.

perks.title: Close-Knit Team
perks.description: Work alongside a passionate crew that feels more like family. Team trips, events, and shared adventures.

perks.title: Flexible Schedules
perks.description: We understand life. Seasonal, part-time, and full-time roles available with adaptable shifts.

perks.title: Stunning Location
perks.description: Wake up to the Pokhara valley every single day. Our office view puts most screensavers to shame.

perks.title: Staff Meals Included
perks.description: Enjoy complimentary meals during shifts prepared fresh on-site. No more sad desk lunches.

positions.title: Zipline & Adventure Guide
positions.summary: Be the face of adventure at Harness. You'll brief, gear up, and guide guests through our zipline and giant swing experiences while ensuring top-tier safety.
responsibilities: Conduct pre-activity safety briefings for guests
Inspect and maintain all harness equipment daily
Operate zipline and giant swing systems
Assist guests of all experience levels with confidence
Respond swiftly to any on-site safety incidents
Maintain accurate activity logs and reports
requirements: Strong communication and guest-facing skills
Physical fitness — comfortable with heights
Prior guiding or outdoor experience preferred
Basic first aid certification (or willingness to obtain)
Fluency in Nepali; conversational English a plus

positions.title: River Rafting Guide
positions.summary: Lead groups through Class III–IV rapids on the Seti River. You'll be responsible for guest safety, paddle instruction, and delivering an unforgettable whitewater experience.
responsibilities: Lead rafting groups on river routes safely and confidently
Conduct pre-launch paddle training and safety demos
Manage emergency protocols and swift-water rescues
Inspect and maintain all rafting equipment
Coordinate with logistics team for daily schedules
Create a fun, high-energy atmosphere for every group
requirements: Certified river rafting guide (Level 3+ preferred)
Swift-water rescue certification mandatory
Minimum 2 seasons of rafting guide experience
Strong swimming ability and physical endurance
First aid and CPR certified

positions.title: Guest Experience Associate
positions.summary: You're the first smile guests see. From booking inquiries to on-site welcome, you ensure every interaction with Harness leaves a lasting impression.
responsibilities: Handle guest inquiries via phone, email, and walk-in
Process activity bookings and coordinate scheduling
Welcome and orient guests on arrival
Resolve complaints and feedback professionally
Coordinate with operations team for smooth handoffs
Maintain guest records and booking systems
requirements: Warm, outgoing personality with strong people skills
Excellent written and spoken English and Nepali
Experience in hospitality, tourism, or customer service
Proficiency with basic computer tools and booking systems
Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

positions.title: Marketing & Content Coordinator
positions.summary: Bring the Harness brand to life across digital platforms. You'll create content, manage our social media presence, and work with the team to attract adventurers from around the world.
responsibilities: Create engaging content for Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok
Photograph and film activities for social and marketing use
Manage posting schedules and community engagement
Assist with campaign planning and seasonal promotions
Coordinate with design and web teams on assets
Track analytics and report on content performance
requirements: Strong visual storytelling and photography skills
Experience managing social media for a brand
Familiarity with video editing tools (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)
Creative writing ability in English
Passion for adventure and the outdoors

positions.title: Event & Venue Coordinator
positions.summary: Manage end-to-end event operations at Harness — from corporate retreats and team outings to private celebrations and destination weddings in our stunning natural setting.
responsibilities: Consult with clients on event requirements and vision
Plan and coordinate event timelines and logistics
Liaise with vendors, catering, and decorators
Supervise on-the-day event execution
Manage budgets and post-event reporting
Build relationships with repeat and corporate clients
requirements: Experience in event management or hospitality coordination
Strong organizational and project management skills
Excellent communication and negotiation ability
Calm under pressure with strong problem-solving skills
Flexible availability including weekends and holidays
